title: 10 best herbal tinctures for difficult speaking
description: Lemon verbena tinctures helps with difficult speaking because of its calming and soothing properties. The herb has a gentle sedative effect that can help to ease anxiety and nervousness, making it easier to articulate thoughts and feelings. Its tranquilizing action can also reduce mental chatter, allowing individuals to focus on the present moment and communicate more clearly.
